G0.label:
case cons
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
b : β
head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : map (fun x => b) tail✝ = replicate tail✝.length b
⊢ map (fun x => b) (head✝ :: tail✝) = replicate (head✝ :: tail✝).length b

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
b : β
head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : map (fun x => b) tail = replicate tail.length b
⊢ map (fun x => b) (head :: tail) = replicate (head :: tail).length b
